title: User Security Advice — Install Guide and Login Page Updates
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want security guidance and install help on the login page, so that I can resolve authentication issues and understand how my data is protected.
description:
Multi-part update to improve user-facing security guidance across the onboarding flow.

### Completed Items
1. **Salesforce Admin Install Guide** — New tutorial published at `/tutorials/salesforce-admin-install-guide/`
2. **Confirmation Page Security Details** — Updated to provide security information during signup
3. **Email Message Update** — Important security update for October 2025 forward

### Remaining Item
4. **Login Page Help Link** — Update both login pages (new and existing users) to include: "Having issues logging in with Salesforce? [Review Our Install Guide](/tutorials/salesforce-admin-install-guide/)"
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce Admin Install Guide is published and accessible
Email messages include updated security information
Both login pages display a link to the install guide for troubleshooting
ux_changes: Help link added to login pages linking to install guide. Confirmation page updated with security details. Email templates updated with security information.
implementation_notes: Install guide published. Login page help link implemented on production.
comment_summary: Ryan updated security guides and links. Waqar implemented the login page changes on production.
